claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A modal dialog surface placed on a logical inline or physical block edge with bounded size, safe-area padding, and contained scrolling.
semantics: Sheet uses the same named dialog semantics, focus containment, dismissal, background isolation, and restoration as Dialog.
start and end follow provider direction independently from locale.
A sticky footer and internal scroll preserve the close path and focused controls.
Touch gestures are not required; trigger, Close, keyboard, speech, and switch paths remain complete.

messageKeys.context: Visible default Sheet.Close text when children are omitted.

preferences.forcedColors: A system-color surface boundary remains visible.
preferences.rtl: Inline start/end side and safe-area layout follow native direction.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Inline sheets fit the viewport; block sheets cap at 85dvb on narrow screens; content scrolls internally.
